hero.sub: Strategic UX/UI design and a working prototype — in weeks, not months. No surprises, no endless waiting. Exactly what you had in mind.

features.label: Why Two Otters?
features.heading: Speed. Precision. Vision from your head to the screen.
features.sub: No more spinning wheels going nowhere. You want a concrete direction, fast.

cards.title: Speed
cards.desc: A working prototype in weeks, not months. Every month your product isn't live is money and opportunity lost.

cards.title: Precision
cards.desc: We get inside your head and bring your vision out accurately. No more gap between imagination and reality.

cards.title: Agility
cards.desc: Real-time revisions and changes before you commit. Being flexible, iterating, and refining is part of the process.

features.quote: "I waited two months and got a pathetic PDF. The project went nowhere."

process.label: Our Process
process.heading: How we work
process.sub: A method built on strategic mapping, fast creation, and real-time feedback.

steps.title: Vision Extraction
steps.desc: We get inside your head — mapping the strategic thinking, understanding the product, the market, and the 'why' behind everything.

steps.title: Strategic UX & Architecture
steps.desc: We build the structure, flows, and user experience. Not a pathetic PDF — a living spec you can actually feel.

steps.title: Working Prototype ✨
steps.desc: We create a prototype you can click, scroll, and feel. 'Seeing it before you commit.' — that's our differentiator.

steps.title: Real-time Refinements
steps.desc: Feedback → changes → fine-tuning. Almost in real-time, until the result matches exactly what you had in mind.

steps.title: Perfect Handoff
steps.desc: Files, reports, and clear guidelines. You're never dependent on us to keep developing your brand.

cards.title: Positioning & Language Package
cards.desc: We sharpen your identity, target audience, and value proposition. Includes competitor mapping, differentiation, messaging, and a visual language system that sets your product apart.

cards.title: Website & UX Package
cards.desc: We build the structure and messaging of your site, then translate it into wireframes and user flows — intuitive, conversion-focused, and ready for design.

cards.title: Marketing System & Design Infrastructure
cards.desc: Long-term infrastructure: lead magnets, a basic funnel, connected digital assets, and a design system that lets you build everything consistently and fast.

cards.title: Focused Strategic Process
cards.desc: A short, intensive session to audit your current state, define a new direction, and deliver a clear action plan — fast.

cards.title: Monthly Retainer
cards.desc: Ongoing strategic advisory, design QA for your dev team, and product decision support — professional coverage without hiring full-time.

cards.title: AI Insight Blueprint
cards.desc: A fast diagnostic tool that scans your digital assets and generates a detailed strategic + UX report in minutes. Sharper than weeks of discovery meetings.

about.label: About Us
about.heading:
Hey! 👋
We're Amir and Keren.
paragraphs: Together we are Two Otters Studio. Since we met back at the community center in high school, the current has taken us many places — but like true otters, we always held hands and stayed together.
Even after more than two decades, we're known for our playfulness and sharpness in everything we do. Yes, like otters (minus the sharpness — we have no way to verify that).

items.q: How long does the process take?
items.a: Usually within 3–4 weeks you have a working prototype. A full strategic design process takes between one and three months, depending on the project size.

items.q: What do I get at the end?
items.a: An interactive prototype you can click and feel, a strategic spec document, design files, and clear guidelines that let you continue independently.

items.q: I've already done a spec process — why will this time be different?
items.a: Because this time you'll see the product before you commit. Instead of a PDF that gets shelved, you get a working prototype you can touch and give feedback on in real time.

items.q: What's the difference between a prototype and a finished product?
items.a: A prototype is an interactive model that simulates the user experience. It's not final code, but it lets you feel, test, and refine before investing in development.

items.q: How much does it cost to work with you?
items.a: Every project is priced based on its size and complexity. We'd love to chat and understand what you're building — then we'll tailor a precise proposal.

items.q: What happens after I receive the prototype?
items.a: You move to development with all the files and reports. You're not dependent on us — but we're here if you need support in the design and development phase too.

contact.label: Let's Talk
contact.heading: You have a vision? Great.
contact.sub: Tell us a bit about what you're building and we'll get back to you within 48 hours.

fields.name: Full name
fields.message: Tell us briefly — what are you building and what's your biggest pain point?
